textByHash.07134150dd476cafd3398b9da987083b596577e3: Oooooh... I knew it was too good to be true... Then leave me to my fate villain, there's no need to taunt me as well as keeping me imprisoned.
textByHash.07d8d93bce3b18151e25a1215ba90b9ed307b370: Exactly. If you could bring me fifty essence, I should be able to reverse the damage done. Be quick though. The longer we wait, the worse things will get.
textByHash.08d7a6df19b54b8e0dcdb8e3ebcb69f4c0973cdb: Yes, last night. He overheard a hooded figure mention a meeting in the Haunted Woods, directly south of Fenkenstrain's Castle, that is apparently set for today.
textByHash.09588f09b5b497d48ae283c8db5361028af9e490: Yes, good thinking adventurer! Give it to me, I will bless it!
textByHash.0be95c88da15e2d0beba1014e9942ab5c14aed89: Mort Myre is a decayed and dangerous swamp to the south east of here. Legend says it was once a beautiful forest called Humblethorn. Now, it's filled with vile emanations from within Morytania.
textByHash.0cd95e12d0590cba895e2470c775035b1ecff862: Misthalin would have quickly fallen to the vampyres, were it not for the bravery of the Seven Priestly Warriors.
textByHash.165d4aa6b402a8d96da9c03420f44f3c6001d4be: Once the temple was complete, the bodies of the Seven Priestly Warriors were laid to rest in tombs of honour in the mausoleum below. On the top of each tomb, a golden gift was placed as a mark of respect.
textByHash.1708e5d16936c8b9e2c9f3dd34103ebd29f62331: Rumours come from all kinds of places. They are rarely true. I am sorry to be so blunt, but I'm offended that you challenge me on this.
textByHash.19830649fa76b0b75b8e12d709a3ed9301a258a0: Oh! Thank you! You have found the key!
textByHash.1b6a74f8108d09c45e09975bd12a5a4beba8e43e: I'm sure you know of runestones, used by mages to power their spells. The essence used to create these stones absorbs magical potential from runic altars to be released later.
textByHash.1c6b12fbe3778100e9a63b35c093980428c29e55: Why would I need to? You'd have me dig up their blessed remains? For what?
textByHash.1d8199733ff72dab1da24b4d6c258642b380c8f9: You need to warn King Roald about possible incursions into Misthalin from Morytania.
textByHash.1debafae0eb5cf3b87fa35d33abf801c718a09fe: I don't see how that can help you! And if you continue in this vein, it will certainly hinder you for you shall not have my support!
textByHash.1e8153053efa75faac649a5167840de39d9b14f9: Honestly, what kind of idiot would go around killing things just because a stranger told them to? What kind of oafish, numb-skulled, dim-witted...
textByHash.220ec2395bb944c6556e5a23a339807e9a5d745c: When they attack, ghasts will devour any food you have. If you have no food, they'll draw their nourishment from you!
textByHash.22fefcbc9a82d9846e0e8399d93802a0bd4f56f0: Well, only a little. The followers of Guthix make all sorts of wild claims where he is involved. Those of us who serve Saradomin know that these claims are mostly baseless.
textByHash.23a2c33efe0057904151c5427897021a156c5a03: Well when there's threats of the world being remade, you can't be too careful. It is wise to be cautious. After all, wisdom is one of Saradomin's greatest strengths.
textByHash.288135ebd9b7ab2f7bc541b210975144d86b72ef: Filliman knew how to tackle them, but I've not heard from him in a long time. Ghasts, when they attack, will devour any food you have. If you have no food, they'll draw their nourishment from you!
textByHash.2b199c5e9a4338de15cba207e75326c8f0c78165: You will find that it has the ability to prevent werewolves from adopting their wolf form in combat. Hopefully it comes in useful.
textByHash.2b89314a3eee4cf53410d6586f51037c0b6ec82d: Into Morytania? Yes, you can. The barrier will prevent the servants of Zamorak from entering Misthalin, but it is safe for those blessed by Saradomin.
textByHash.2e155528ce2613e144b568045c0f64913e38aefd: I understand that my friend, but digging up the remains of saintly heroes will not aid us in any way!
textByHash.2e1ecd1ca793c61fe6a33e3b061ef82847fdedfd: This is amazing news. Myreque prevail!
textByHash.2e5287767cba1b3a026146747fa88a5fdabda570: Yes. They're a band of freedom fighters. They fight to protect the humans trapped in Morytania from the tyranny of the vampyres. Their hope is to one day rid the region of all evil.
textByHash.2e5da5fb9da0a79cead00c7f7e4c10448b124701: So what do you say adventurer? Will you aid me and all of Misthalin in foiling this Zamorakian plot?
textByHash.2e62fa8722aca79ef21cb52aa5ac3e9047ef0849: On the eleventh day they were to be joined by reinforcements. However, when those reinforcements arrived, they found the Seven Priestly Warriors and their forces had been slain by the vampyres.
textByHash.2f58d7b5e5daea84167c840c0b93aa4d877283dd: Very well, but there is only so much I can do. Remember that I am still a priest of Saradomin.
textByHash.2fd233df802c39fc4d7be3255f0c43e9ae25367d: That's right. In the Haunted Woods.
textByHash.3071d30f481e57ce616045d4485a2d522634ec97: You have brought me notes saying 'I promise to pay the bearer on demand the listed number of Rune Essence.' How is that supposed to help me?
textByHash.31e80c8a36c7080df0f2aed73cf232b18e5cec16: Well, after here was ambushed outside the temple a while back, Ivan and I decided to keep a closer eye on things.
textByHash.3233cb9e790291586f871631dfd68ffd65b1502c: Sadly, all seven of them fell in the final battle against Drakan. They are now buried here, in this very mausoleum.
textByHash.32f4be9b251ab9f4d2a0633d08376a4ae7b8cf87: Ivan said he heard them throughout the day, but usually when things were very quiet. We both looked around near the temple but we didn't find anything.
textByHash.34f7d59d67b4f2c63e599ddfadaefdbdd752f257: Once he awakens, they say he will remake the world, destroying civilisation as we know it.
textByHash.35270e725fb807430787f0423244e227d916fdcf: Oh dear! I once did some studying of the edicts. I can see why the king and his advisors are cautious.
textByHash.3735e71f88a279a2946b4266316013ccca38ba4f: There's a man called Filliman who lives in Mort Myre. He comes by the temple from time to time but I haven't seen him recently. I was wondering if you could check in on him?
textByHash.3872bbd06741b05042f4887bc4ba9c679b16c9cc: Interesting. It's odd you should come to report this, because we've also experienced some strange happenings around here.
textByHash.39f48a8c4d5fb66efbbf0dff4e77648fdbe762e0: The death of Sani has really affected him as well. Like him, she was an orphan. They had a lot in common.
textByHash.3a8e255f7bce8dc80a47c529289be2d19e4cbd6d: If you don't mind me saying, that is a bit of a redundant question. All of the Seven Priestly Warriors are buried here, including Ivandis.
textByHash.3a92d2bcf24d5cbc179683ad4ab439ccb9e55fd9: Ah... Well that's just the thing. He went to spy on the meeting.
textByHash.3bd6aa9107649a8f9c1075fa8724e4b3e652dcc9: If I get too close, it will probably wake up and kill me, very slowly and painfully.
textByHash.3c54647b1b0c18e8c7c1020fcf48320fa8f22729: Well done for bringing Ivan to the temple. He will be much safer here.
textByHash.3cbdd2d3dc82f7e21595fadc8f75c6391cbe5d55: No adventurer, you should not risk waking it. Even now, it could pose a huge threat.
textByHash.3eebf93848999dbf3ffe11f693f7d59cbf3498c4: Please, do not challenge me on matters of faith.
textByHash.40573df61a007d6c4f35e666f6211d1e62f7c5a6: Well then, my friend, I will pray that Saradomin's blessings be upon you and that he guides your actions and keeps you safe from harm.
textByHash.408c5d9ff8f5073a854c1d24225f870e14dae953: I know that it is built on the site where the Seven Priestly Warriors defended Misthalin against the evil vampyres. I also know that their sanctified and holy remains rest peacefully beneath us.
textByHash.40e33d22eae6bb9ada7059ae5d630fe25d8f49e3: Hello. Did you find anything out nearby?
textByHash.45304ae308e65d5271d452059a652f3cfab35c75: I must make immediate preparations and meet with other members of my order. You must hurry directly to King Roald and impart this information to him.
textByHash.45c4a089fc68f9ea7559d8d72e06a13e9a0ea182: Maybe. But if so, it was only for a time. A few weeks ago, the reports of people going missing in the area started again. And they're much worse this time.
textByHash.46427dd889ef5a452b195a074431290524ec98a4: I just hope that all our sacrifices are worth it.
textByHash.47bec3c667334c3901ec248d2634878c200c7d27: Very well my friend, prepare yourself for the blessings of Saradomin. Here we go!
textByHash.47cb753c262afd9049498a16cb88547b0754c14e: It's certainly possible and more than likely. I'd be grateful if you could extend your search as wide as you can.
textByHash.47ded3d34f5d81548ca8324f655133315b44b5f2: What we do know is that Guthix is a god of nature and balance. We believe him to be of average power. Enough to pay attention to, but nothing compared to the strength of Saradomin.
textByHash.4856eb0cf70f05c3f7c4fb1a8ba9ea76d6c88b13: Sadly, with the guard dog gone, there was nothing to stop those Zamorakians from entering the mausoleum. From what I can tell, they have used some kind of evil potion to pollute the Salve.
textByHash.4a199326379f5586ca925406f9c57affee5543be: Thank you, adventurer. There is a well in the mausoleum beneath the temple that provides direct access to the source of the Salve. That will be where the Zamorakians will attempt their sabotage.
textByHash.4ee58fb9ebaff9ab7b238c41907e2965dd3a4a43: Well, not a great deal... but there is something you could do for me if you're interested. Though it is quite dangerous.
textByHash.4f561964b5fbe4975bde93dd8c187d5585e07392: I am not resistant at all, my friend. I would happily talk history with you for as long as you desire. You do not wish to speak of history though, just rumours.
textByHash.4f5f7a97f707132efe0a26a0729af5835181c7df: Indeed it does my friend. But thanks to you and the Myreque, we have at least the hope of finding salvation in this dark and oppressive land.
textByHash.4f7f314987c90e6223a3b300f99e8cb0c237e195: Ok, here's another one for you.
textByHash.4f8aaedd339a599b352afa3491a590ac3d706e90: We did. His adviser though, Aeonisig, encouraged him to refrain from military action.
textByHash.518b41fc5664381bfc765303d781a8185bf86094: The Myreque will need to know all that you have experienced so far. You should report to Veliaf when you can.
textByHash.51a701d2a95b61f0251a0cf506104427ef851a88: I just need to ensure this vampyre is trapped. I will meet you down in the mausoleum.
textByHash.51e07a338eb66cfa34ad8c865dfe4c6495556ab1: The first settlement you'll likely come across is Canifis, a town of werewolves. They probably won't attack you unless provoked, but you should still be cautious.
textByHash.540b7088da97b9cd6486bf18044258c4985291ac: Both his parents died in the Sanguinesti region, though he still holds hope that they may be found alive.
textByHash.5507908d883809cd19bff360224d5887a7061575: Search to the south of Mort Myre. Remember that he's a druid so he can conceal himself within nature quite well. My guess is that he lives in the southern area of the swamp, though he could be anywhere.
textByHash.5795b84868247a9ba3815d735e84921652bbc0c3: But one day, he was betrayed by some of the people who he had tried to help. This naturally made him more careful when dealing with strangers again and so, instead of showing himself, he would follow them.
textByHash.5894bd4392eeeae19b7f4f7064f071327a36fe9a: Morytania has never been darker. Trust in Saradomin, friend. There is still a chance we will live through this darkness.
textByHash.59af5e3ed27f2f2c35eded587509b4e3f5f479e4: A great statue was also built over the river, so that all who might try and cross into Misthalin would know that these lands are protected by Saradomin himself.
textByHash.5a2109e64838ffadf75d25d0a92747f265fb34ac: The followers of Guthix claim that this war ended when Guthix awoke from his slumber and banished the other gods, leaving the world to mortals.
textByHash.5b0314fe46f1168eef2e7d248330b884b31916ec: When the Salve was blessed, a small number of vampyres were left trapped on this side of it. They were heavily weakened, but still posed a dangerous threat.
textByHash.5bd8601ee374d8ce4ae4e3be39e7ffca6c3428c9: Filliman Tarlock is his full name and he's a druid. He lives in Mort Myre much like a hermit, but there's many a traveller who he's helped.
textByHash.5d09b93873fa29b2f0c31de60c7f1f7a3303ec06: Hello. Have you been to Varrock yet?
textByHash.5e727420e7bd1ccc86889f18f836aa3ceda6fcd4: Hello. How are things in Morytania?
textByHash.5f739caedfe345e90d6d0247e961a523e59a67b8: I fear this group of Zamorakians intends to take advantage of that. If they can somehow pollute the Salve, the blessings on the river might fail.
textByHash.6153d5002ab2d80648cac2a41d9adc0fcbc5ab0f: Not everything. There's still you, me and Ivan. Veliaf is out there somewhere as well. It's not much, but it's something to be thankful for.
textByHash.6182c012c13616920ea6b00f2ef4413ed4082545: Veliaf, the leader of their Mort Myre group, is an old friend. I imagine they'd appreciate the help of someone like you, if you can find them.
textByHash.619c4d0c2b0a8c209ea26aef973dd93108737f1a: Morytania wasn't enough for them though. Soon, they set their sights on these lands as well.
textByHash.61acae3c1cf94c7a048439ed7c0bb13c21d3ef70: Indeed, I hear Morytania becomes more dangerous by the day.
textByHash.6427bbfd57f24e443c943788089f0dd9a71e3bad: Please take this food to Filliman, he'll likely appreciate it. His home is somewhere in the southern end of Mort Myre. I don't know the exact location I'm afraid.
textByHash.67eba06d6bf468ec8dd0a3a42abab75fc743aae5: He would follow them at a distance and make the path clear for them, showing them to the temple and to salvation. Saradomin bless him! He is a good man.
textByHash.6e8a3ad31ffa09ac5c440a9b4594da3105564a24: No, but as those fiendish Zamorakians pointed out to me with delight, as I am the descendant of one of the Seven Priestly Warriors who blessed the river, it will likely recognise the smell of my blood.
textByHash.7259390b6cd3d2ef982431dbd6c3f85f271d835b: Greetings again adventurer. How go your travels in Morytania? Is it as evil as I have heard?
textByHash.7302f5d485b3de148942ce93e608ac788225cea6: A Ghast is a poor soul who died in Mort Myre. They're undead of a special class and they're untouchable as far as I'm aware! Filliman knows how to tackle them though.
textByHash.73fa7679e2cfeb95cd7f1ed22ade1c5e73e97922: I could hear them laughing about some gullible fool that they tricked into killing the guard dog at the monument.
textByHash.73fee85ef37cab96507dd678aff5116d8df15393: Well don't give up adventurer! That key must be around here somewhere! I know none of those Zamorakians ever got very far from this building!
textByHash.74cd1e4206b4c5e36abfc1be4cf7ecf72db69ea1: Ivan mentioned that he heard some strange noises recently out in front of the temple. Could you have a look and make sure there's nothing funny going on?
textByHash.777787f5f8ce6f973536895e5e1be45593bad30a: Mort Myre was once a beautiful forest by the name of Humblethorn until the evil denizens of Morytania descended. Now their evil emanations have putrified and diseased the forest into a decaying swamp of death.
textByHash.77ee61d730b1f4bbfa0409b7288e629a138c5c14: Well, I understand. You must be busy.
textByHash.7907a4d8516025521e71ef604d39c1418359254e: I feared that when those Zamorakians attacked this place and imprisoned me up here, Misthalin would be doomed!
textByHash.792a3e116d23df5803dd41a1185cd7395c7b0776: You should head for the Haunted Woods, friend. With luck, you'll find Ivan just south of Fenkenstrain's Castle.
textByHash.7a16c9934135985ea17e4a0c790a3f54f5640f88: I must warn you though, Morytania is an evil land. The region is filled with creatures and monsters more terrifying than any you'll find on this side of the Salve.
textByHash.7ad1e9efe6d31f3bcb58174395d33ad00060db9b: It is said that long ago, back when the gods walked these lands with us, a great war was fought called the God Wars.
textByHash.7b4b96b04c19828323cf5c5ca21ae5ea0d609237: Other locals have reported seeing shadowy figures in the Silvaria pass. Could just be an enterprising, though perhaps ruthless, bunch of brigands. If it is, simply give them a taste of Misthalin law and order.
textByHash.7cabbfe3a5ad0c8252941f45b489d16a9769dde3: There wasn't time. He only found out about the meeting last night!
textByHash.7cc748bad537e1666499f29cd96a08551261e75f: Well... I don't think so. There's not much to do in that place.
textByHash.7d76d2b4eaf0fe522c5e2aaf614f03def9cba61f: For a time, nothing unusual happened. The reports of trouble in the area died down, and everything seemed normal.
textByHash.7e12bb5ec5782075e17b3c96a4b58f431042d2bc: There you go my friend, you're now blessed. It's funny, now I look at you, there seems to be something of the faith about you. Anyway, good luck with your quest!
textByHash.7e18b4291a92a0923bd47159eeec731412283e85: I have taught Ivan everything I know. There is nothing more he can gain from me.
textByHash.820d0feff94350470001dd84261a5df8f7547cf6: The edicts state that no single god should be allowed to gain enough power to become dominant. Instead, a balance must be kept between the gods and their servants.
textByHash.82b2904ef7b5f0261d16eec6ebf97c09bdbc931d: This coffin here contains one of those vampyres. The Zamorakians somehow found it and brought it here with them.
textByHash.82badbf371cfd301db04e61d4c4f0fd612daf83b: If they should manage to desecrate the holy River Salve, we will be defenceless against the vampyres of Morytania!
textByHash.82f132810bf969598bfc17eda1a708333a90d5fa: He's as well as can be expected considering the circumstances. He's a very confused young man at the moment what with the shadowy events that started his life.
textByHash.832e7740552936f1cff9ce556e156fb73c5d9e71: Filliman is a druid of some considerable power. He helped many people in Morytania escape when the evil descended upon the land. His knowledge of plants and nature was exceptional.
textByHash.834f57bbb022921277b1eea15ed857bb998027f7: You should keep your Wolfbane dagger to hand. It will prevent them from taking on their wolf form.
textByHash.84ec265aa1c9848a8f4d8f04c6e5ca73bb2eb616: Good luck to you both. Saradomin be with you.
textByHash.85b99c60dd6c66ed384cfceef6a7e6407824a920: Their sacrifice was not in vain though. Before they were defeated, the Seven Priestly Warriors managed to bless the Salve with the holy power of Saradomin.
textByHash.87a6e04dea24de4e7a4a74dad0016e24bb7a8c19: The stories say the war lasted for thousands of years and that the carnage saw the world forever changed.
textByHash.88b1c63662cb638e74f95d28df20e8053f3325dc: Not ignorance my friend. There are ways to save Morytania from the vampyres. This is not one of them.
textByHash.8a1706c4aa55c07ca55e055020aa0ea3813623c5: Bring me fifty rune essence so that I can undo the damage done by those Zamorakians.
textByHash.8c7afb11b9b3a3ea73f13e85d10821e0cff2981a: Well, the water of the Salve should still have enough power to work against the vampyre, even if the Zamorakians have desecrated it.
textByHash.8dc6147d3244e669f70c4a4fd193a6c24bf27811: During the Fourth Age, the vampyre forces of Lowerniel Drakan attempted to invade Misthalin. They would have succeeded, were it not for the Seven Priestly Warriors.
textByHash.8e11f0ad9ca2293651f7e0bfccd4be8647d611c8: It is said that many years ago, the land that is now Morytania was a peaceful Saradominist kingdom. Alas, all that ended when the vampyres invaded, claiming the land as their own.
textByHash.90ac145ef80c5fa070fe8d211b41935b5b4a9220: The key must be somewhere nearby. One of the Zamorakians might have it, or they might have hidden it somewhere. That's not the only problem though.
textByHash.9297536fed10f214e7727bdaea6904d95f2b2966: The temple here was built soon after. It guards the source of the River Salve, and acts as the only passage between Misthalin and Morytania.
textByHash.934c653f2cabbb21cdd5a4c289d2698c963f7e0b: For ten days and nights they fought, never sleeping, never eating, fuelled by their desire to make the world a better place for humans to live.
textByHash.942350659f857c3dde120314878f3062dafa9cfa: Ah. Glad you made it. Things are worse than I feared down here. I'm not sure if I will be able to repair the damage.
textByHash.95b2bd4dd5ac2181c1a9484d0e910518926afced: The well here is built right over the source of the river. That means that their potion will spread all the way down the Salve, disrupting the blessings placed upon it.
textByHash.96b16d81e01ccdc6749ea9acfbe4a341a5268b26: We believe so. Ivan has been keeping a close watch. The disappearances have mostly taken place further up the pass, however, so it's taken a while for him to find any leads.
textByHash.974b5dec620897ccae84b60c87a10b08b1b55670: No, that would not work. The power I have from Saradomin is not great enough to cleanse an entire river of this foul Zamorakian pollutant.
textByHash.9776c4b1abf4b86c6e2818d90e646c4775a8441e: Don't take that tone with me! Saradomin's powers are not to be underestimated.
textByHash.97cdab0be8e8b00b094af3cf165f98b9ed4e4542: Well, as much as it saddens me to say so adventurer, Lord Saradomin's presence has not been felt on the land for many years now.
textByHash.97d6529db66a5c520e3211b73e9d79ff2de044e8: Absolutely not! What a disgrace that you should even ask! He rests pure and undisturbed beneath this hallowed earth!
textByHash.981599a1eb2e9f19908bdb609055f52b3f6164e9: Yes, I know! Luckily for you it washed up on the banks of the Salve earlier! Here, take it again, but please try and be more careful this time.
textByHash.9d8f532f0ddb3cb3206b715b7c3d56c9bf2e17b9: Now, please be aware of the ghasts, you cannot attack them, only Filliman knew how to take them on. Just run from them if you can. If you get lost, try to make your way back to the temple.
textByHash.9e1de1c7b78d55b0d36eb817893c7bced3d74245: Well, you brought him here, which was very brave. He's very grateful to you. It's remarkable, really. He has this inner calmness that I find so very affecting.
textByHash.9f6e1a6d97cb6c60474d499bf50738f27ffef486: This is terrible, terrible news! They have found a way to get across the Salve!
textByHash.a0de90da48bb3d4a79fcd7f0cbe918f48dcb6a0a: The priests of old would incapacitate trapped vampyres with the blessings of Saradomin. I suggest you do the same.
textByHash.a2b85d74e765e158f0d59e7507b74255bfec4236: Without their sacrifice, Drakan and his kin would have long since taken over Misthalin.
textByHash.a3626bfa6a7e55b2c24ff2a348457d0270d77b74: Unfortunately, they have. Several people have gone missing from the local limestone mining area.
textByHash.a3c4ef26561b47cc0e2849f326fe6af6f3303068: Of course, while we know that he still watches over us, his power here is not as strong as it once was.
textByHash.a56125f3a6f26ebc64ed9ec057eca26ae549f97e: Veliaf, my friend, you and I will not be around to protect Ivan forever. We have guided him to this point, but maybe it's time for him to start looking after himself.
textByHash.a6bf90f1c907678454b8ef17abbae87c645ceb66: Maybe you should try and get hold of some?
textByHash.a75d7a3b7ef39f7f3fbed7d653450d6bc93b0a55: It's just a story of course. All made up by the Guthixians to help them feel relevant.
textByHash.a7663bcb7bffc2b033b801cd46181358b4cbc59b: Hello. Have you been to Varrock yet?
textByHash.a8d1cf0cbaef376470252430de60f5c9ba1df440: This passage could be the least of our worries soon though. Before long, the vampyres will be able to cross at any point of the river. We won't be able to reinforce all of it.
textByHash.a99a0e9db036edeeaac7379ecfacb12cb615a96d: How goes it adventurer? Any luck in finding the key to the cell or a way of stopping the vampyre yet?
textByHash.abdb02375f637076d7ccfe69aad75d41fc072687: Are you becoming forgetful? The Seven Priestly Warriors were the ones who originally blessed the River Salve.
textByHash.abea6fb970bac5e59ab857db2c76e8fb049138e3: His studies go well and he has Saradomin's blessings, it's clear to see. I would see him as a worthy successor as protector of Paterdomus. When all of his teachings are done, naturally.
textByHash.acbd53ce5717e0ee3d31963759e263b5f20ba83b: What little information there is, is probably already known to you.
textByHash.adb4a1cd560f9dc4f6107d43d366e304b69cc032: I'm glad you're keeping your sense of humour. It will help you to maintain mental clarity while dealing with the tasks you've been given.
textByHash.ae3c4e602f5fefd116f631c4cc77f6174ed06b74: One last thing. While in Morytania, stay alert for any mention of the Myreque.
textByHash.ae90c1a553ac05c4e01913ce1549fdaf94d964c0: Right, I think that's everything. Just the blessing itself now. Hold still a moment.
textByHash.b1a3598e3ea74bbe4c91bd21c765fb342d657c53: Ah. I hear it's a nasty place, full of Zamorakian filth. Suffering from some sort of outbreak as well, I've been told.
textByHash.b34685bbaa20341c4dac0d267aeffcbb553c1a62: Good luck out there. Stay safe.
textByHash.b5df95bd5982459f23489c77691787c096778e6c: I believe we might be able to soak up the evil magic that the potion has released into the river.
textByHash.b622fe9a7551076407d031f131e896ed0ca184ca: This passage is currently the only route between Morytania and Misthalin. The barrier here draws power from the river.
textByHash.b661c5bc4238ce3a2bfc44eedd1203651d201d84: Ivan... Well, Ivan is special. He is the last in his bloodline.
textByHash.b85248af9d3e258e62c94ed39c714f9842d109dd: And you know I would do anything to help those people.
textByHash.b86f0efe3eec3b3ad9b1eefdec3190a3c684e2db: Yes I know, but you have no space for a it at the moment so I can't return it to you.
textByHash.b895a4d29e5c8ce78a497a9609d1b7a06b5296c0: We need to get to that well. However, the immediate problem is that I'm trapped in this cell.
textByHash.ba4371e3adce49b4254a22807a35614d99ba69b1: He's a grown man, Veliaf! One far smarter than either you or I. If he wants to do something, he will do it. I can't stop him!
textByHash.be462972f58b528e66fe8505fa6beba449d2805a: Excellent work adventurer! Quickly, try it on the door, and see if it will free me!
textByHash.c0bef5951c854c593ea8ef6c1eb92242959d7db7: Worst of all are the vampyres, the rulers of Morytania. Be very cautious of their kind. Many are completely immune to human weaponry. Those that aren't, are still very hard to kill.
textByHash.c2e9115f8fd63c51ff5de986c4057401237633a9: Servants of Saradomin are not concerned with triffling matters such as proof. We have our faith, and our faith guides us.
textByHash.c38bb0a3348c38d6b84a2ce7a6fa4025e0eef6ed: That's fine, I'm sure someone else will be along shortly who can. Now, if you excuse me, I do have some things to be getting on with.
textByHash.c39e0e366541a62ef4196b810383340fba200a36: Excellent! That should do it! I will bless these stones and place them within the well. With the river safe, Misthalin should be protected from the vampyres once more!
textByHash.c53e5ae3cb10ac02a2239e4641677e8cac7301ab: They were apparently created at the end of the God Wars to ensure that the world never sees a conflict like that again.
textByHash.c64d5468c09a2264d7546eb3ddd479c3d98560bf: I'm not sure if this is the best time for a history lesson. I suppose I can give you a brief overview though. It might help you understand our next steps.
textByHash.c787568a6625c28b11a2c7b024b8ef76fa437f48: This is likely not the true version of events. Guthixians also claim that it was Guthix himself who made the world. Obviously, that is not correct.
textByHash.c842ce015bd7ab44d2a33d191cf9a3fbf3cfb502: We were both a bit nervous about going any further west than the steps.
textByHash.c915992b8d9c6a6c96d848e39c21b52bba72af19: No, you cannot! It is taking all of my willpower to hold that barrier in place. You must restore the sanctity of the Salve as soon as possible!
textByHash.c9b922ad3a6cbf634e674615ac65a1b7ff195487: They led the armies of Misthalin against the vampyres in a great battle that took place right where this temple stands.
textByHash.ccfcc3071f5d1803b2974cbf074caacb1cbd369b: Oh! You do not appear to be one of those Zamorakians who imprisoned me! Who are you and why are you here?
textByHash.cfadf1ef4e82b909dff09687d72bd76c00bd42ac: I need you to help me with this.
textByHash.cfd6a40b8b0aa58473a81960f18cf2014c4d5241: The swamp decays everything. We put a fence around it to stop unwary travellers going in. Anyone who dies in the swamp is forever cursed to haunt it as a ghast.
textByHash.d0bb6cca39e5b54d5744f1a9a41a89ed09b4c9c7: Entire groups have been going missing. Not just miners and travellers either. Even some of the king's mercenaries have vanished.
textByHash.d11e6b66dcbf81483c12b7bcdbe1b9afff17add2: Excellent work adventurer! I am free at last! Let me ensure that evil vampyre is trapped for good. I will then meet you down in the mausoleum.
textByHash.d4087d297d722b1fc85abc105fef692ad2e6b34a: A Ghast is a poor soul who died in Mort Myre. They're undead of a special class, they're untouchable apart from with special druidic items.
textByHash.d55521f47eafd8b27ed2c80cc5eedfc0104b0575: I know not if it will help, but please take this key. It will allow you access to a secret library here in the mausoleum. In there you may find what you're looking for, but I pray you never reveal this to me.
textByHash.d70697673832341e1897d819b36039212ef73483: Please go and look for him, I would appreciate it!
textByHash.d91b9309b6435a03382d23f62b4b7910fd8e06d7: Before long, there will be nothing to stop the vampyres from invading Misthalin at their leisure.
textByHash.db2f65cf4ee7b7284dface92df2a8dad12ad8900: If that happens, there won't be anything to stop an invasion from Morytania.
textByHash.dc4ebb0db12db4227f5c1fdf3e6f75600b414123: Have you managed to find Filliman yet?
textByHash.df565813d88666b8ab0527e7b47d8c61c31f7aaa: How's life been treating you since you got blessed?
textByHash.e400a236610c07849648695dddf3171d6321c9b2: It's funny, because when I look at you, there does seem to be something of the faith about you. Have you considered a life of service to Saradomin?
textByHash.e65c8cb0f8d80a77d81353df4c01d3f546c27844: Ivan is the last living descendant of Ivandis Seergaze himself. Once I am gone, he will be the only remaining descendant of the Seven Priestly Warriors.
textByHash.e6e2731c0afc6e68c55e20efef59fb6e7e0f8cdd: Excellent work, adventurer! Unfortunately, as you know, I cannot risk waking the vampyre in that coffin.
textByHash.e7402eff7b8bc811360b92aafc2e39c3ed5225f6: I have told you all I know. That is as much as I, or anyone, can do.
textByHash.e7a0705c5d803c674da54c325a228059fb10dcd8: Most people that come this way tell stories of when they were lost and paths that just seemed to 'open up' before them! I think it was Filliman Tarlock helping out.
textByHash.e84eae47edc7e8992dcda38e7eaa52f31123baec: Well, let's just say if we cannot undo whatever damage has been done here, the entire land is in grave peril!
textByHash.e94d394ed3e1b169a88a662349174093c94f17b0: Ghasts attack travellers, turning food to rotten filth.
textByHash.ea09853798e412f04fd062fb4b58ce9847e84c46: Not really. You might learn more in the library below, but I'd be cautious of believing every word in those books.
textByHash.ede22280dd85bdcb05623bc30d5ab7832230dc7a: Here, take these runes. They should help you to return to Varrock faster.
textByHash.ee0115d344f85a82a5ce9d3b051e6af3af367c00: Very gruff. almost animal-like in fact.
textByHash.f0326a7038ae5c4cb6b20cf8fae696125a2a3380: Please take this dagger. It has been handed down within my family for generations and is filled with the power of Saradomin.
textByHash.f22b3e046c38fddfb29c5e524f815d217fdea4d2: You can be sure that a great many people hope for exactly the same thing. Good luck to you, and Myreque prevail!
textByHash.f38f3307d66b0bd264ea15a18d87efbafeb04a72: I assume he's made suggestions that Ivandis isn't actually buried in this temple? If he has made such a claim, it's not something I'm prepared to talk about.
textByHash.f5f38b9e7c9ca20c0a640c61ce27ab844090ee66: Well at this point you should be no stranger to their tale, though I understand the desire for a recap.
textByHash.f67d3f5c247347e7ab90a03de81c6d1ab0c2c731: Their blessings remain to this day, ensuring no vampyre can cross the river.
textByHash.f728a5eb88d692f74071b3177f161ac05ba92b27: Yes! Great idea! If his coffin is doused in the blessed water he will be unable to leave it! Use it on his coffin, quickly!
textByHash.f729c1358025bdea2ea9924e0fe845af7c9862d2: You talk of the suggestion that Ivandis Seergaze isn't actually buried with the others, don't you? That isn't a conversation I wish to have.
textByHash.f76cf8600355f1612ccc2cb2dc62999fff3c11f0: But you're here now, so let's get started.
textByHash.f79a0688ba682af3caa4c7c33880fe1043b3a9fe: The warriors were the ones to bless the River Salve and build this temple, ensuring that Misthalin would be forever safe from the evils of Morytania.
textByHash.f86a741d359a964485f393cbdfd1b8ef6fd53cdb: I have managed to reinforce the barrier, but I must continue focussing on it to keep it intact. Although the passage is safe for now, I do not know how long I can keep it that way.
textByHash.f88a14af84af441285e72e0c7cb77fa2bbec4cd0: Hmmm, how can I say this diplomatically. Veliaf is a good leader, but perhaps he shouldn't be voicing ideas about religious history.
textByHash.fbdb3ff4455da2aaa418f56d51b7e633d2584a32: However, I do have one other idea.
textByHash.fd06cbd65aab19d6b8cc4d1a53fce8c8c672b9eb: If the balance is not kept, the followers of Guthix will try to intervene. If they are unable to restore balance, they will supposedly awaken Guthix from his slumber beneath the earth.
textByHash.fe456c80eb62a3ee5ed8f99a96fc3764a97619ed: That's right! Oh, praise be to Saradomin! All is not yet lost!
textByHash.fe4d7adc29b9f0fc9116c527bdd43116ffa7fc61: I must confess, I have heard some strange things around here recently. Like hushed voices.
textByHash.ff8cc88e9c644d55100477f5b08570b88f53fdc4: It's a family heirloom after all!
